properties.summary: A bright and spacious four bedroom mid-terrace home, situated within a sought after residential location.

This fantastic 1930's semi detached house would be a wonderful family home for years to come as it benefits from having six bedrooms, two bath / shower rooms, a downstairs W.C, an integral garage and off street parking to the front for several cars.

This spacious four bedroom family home is located within easy access of Twickenham and Teddington town centres, Fulwell Station and some excellent schools. Providing nearly 1,800 sq ft of versatile space over three levels, the ground floor has a fabulous kitchen/dining/family room and ...

This stunning four bedroom family home is perfectly extended and modernised, offering the ideal balance of space, style and location. This home is ready to move into and enjoy from day one. Families will love the proximity to highly regarded schools including Waldegrave School and Turing House, ...

Exceptionally spacious family home, 4 beds, spacious office, 3 bathrooms, garden backing onto Crane Park, ample off-road parking, garden office, utility room, solar panels, fast BR trains only 15 mins walk, 8 mins walk for buses to Heathrow, town centre & Richmond. Call now to view!

This stunning family home is a must view. Having been fully extended recently this house offers contemporary living whilst retaining a lot of its original period features. There are four bedrooms, two bathrooms and the perfect location for schools.

"One of Strawberry Hill's best kept secrets, property in Grange Avenue is as rarely available as it is sought after due to its central yet quiet location. This modern four-bedroom town house offers generous living space, off road parking, an impressive integral garage and a garden that captu...

"Fifth Cross Road is a location that immediately will grab buyers' attention, however it is the semi-detached houses backing onto the Waldegrave School playing field which always seem to create a different kind of buzz among buyers. Perhaps, it's without question then that this four bed semi...

This immaculate family home has been extended by the current owners and has a large open plan kitchen living area with plenty of room for relaxing and entertaining and a separate utility room with downstairs loo. There are four bedrooms, two bathrooms, off street parking and a private garden.

This large end-of-terrace Victorian house has been fully refurbished by the current owners. The accommodation benefits from two bath/shower rooms, five bedrooms, a large rear garden and scope to extend/open up the rear if required.

This stunning Victorian semi detached house, spanning over 2,600 square feet, seamlessly blends period charm with modern luxury. Featuring five double bedrooms and generous living spaces, off street parking for multiple cars and secluded back garden.

"Any buyer on the hunt for a home close to the Green who has become frustrated about the recent lack of quality period stock will be in for a real treat ...." - Chelsea (Devenports Branch Manager) Spanning in excess of 1500 square feet, this attractive and sizeable five-bedr...

A pretty Edwardian family house with four bedrooms and bundles of charm & character. It has a gorgeous landscaped garden and is located near to excellent schools as well as amenities on Stanley Road and Fulwell Station within a 1/4 mile.
A handsome and substantial red brick Edwardian property which provides well balanced, generous and beautifully presented family accommodation.
